name: ravel
description: Build and explore safe local knowledge graphs for code, documents, PDFs, and schemas.

interface.shortDescription: Safe local knowledge graphs for any codebase.
interface.longDescription: Ravel maps code and documents, validates agent enrichment, explains relationships, analyzes change impact, and creates onboarding tours without uploading source code.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $ravel to map, explain, and teach this codebase safely.
